title: Notifications - Onboarding - Don't Allow, enabled, master toggle is working
scenario: Verify that toggling the Notification master toggle OFF and ON after enabling OS notifications allows the toggle to change and disables all sub-settings when OFF.
steps: 1. Start onboarding and set notifications to "Don't Allow".
2. Navigate to App Settings > General > Notification tab.
4. Enable notifications in the OS settings.
6. Toggle the Notification master toggle OFF.
7. Toggle the Notification master toggle ON.
expected: The toggle value can be changed. When OFF is selected, all sub-settings below are set to OFF.
